questions.question: Describe the four key operating system services provided by the resource management part of an operating system. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Input/Output Services, Process Management, Memory Management, and File Management

questions.question: What is the main function of the I/O manager in an operating system? (5 marks)
questions.hint: To manage the input/output operations between the user's program and the devices such as keyboard, mouse, and hard disk.

questions.question: Explain the purpose of a process scheduler in an operating system. (10 marks)
questions.hint: To allocate system resources, allocate and deallocate memory, and schedule processes to run on available CPU resources, ensuring efficient use of system resources.
